calendar.matters:
Petition For Confirmation Of Sale Of Real Property Upon Beneficiary Objection To Notice Of Proposed Action
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Advanced From Jun-01-26 To Apr-22-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Confirmation Of Sale Of Real Property Upon Beneficiary Objection To Notice Of Proposed Action
Off Calendar May-07-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lillian E. Ng, in person, for Successor Trustee Paul Van Wambeke.

Mary McNeil, via Zoom videoconference, for Maria Van Wambeke, beneficiary.

At the outset, the court and Ms. Ng discuss the venue issue. At the conclusion of discussion, the court determines that venue in San Francisco is proper. Ms. McNeil offers testimony as to why this matter should not proceed today due to notice issues. After additional discussion, Ms. McNeil orally objects to the instant petition moving forward today which is overruled by the court on the record.

The hearing on the Petition for Confirmation of Sale of Real Property Upon Beneficiary Objection to Notice of Proposed Action proceeds. The sale was confirmed at $2,520.500 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. Counsel for Successor Trustee is to submit to the court an overbid form.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

Petition For Confirmation Of Sale Of Real Property Upon Beneficiary Objection To Notice Of Proposed Action
Off Calendar Apr-22-2026 Continued To Apr-27-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
